name: Cahill Seeds
message: Cahill Seeds is one of the largest seed growers in eastern Montana, established in 1996. The company specializes in identifying, testing, and multiplying seed genetics to support growers and processors. They offer a wide variety of seeds including wheat, peas, lentils, chickpeas, canola, and various forage crops. Cahill Seeds serves clients across eastern Montana, other states, and Canada, working closely with plant breeders to deliver optimal seed solutions.
